footer.summary: Designing resilient digital products with modern engineering standards and product-focused execution.

hireMePage.title: Websites that are clear, fast, and reliable
hireMePage.description: I build websites that are easy to understand, technically solid, and pleasant to use. Whether you need a new site, a focused landing page, or improvements to an existing website, I deliver something practical that is ready to use.

heroImage.title: Hero image placeholder
heroImage.description: A strong personal photo or portrait can be placed here later.

honestStory.title: An honest story
honestStory.description: I do not promise what is unrealistic. You get a clear view of what makes sense, what is unnecessary, and where the best return is likely to come from.

idealSolution.title: The best solution is shaped together
idealSolution.description: The strongest website does not come from assumptions, but from collaboration. I turn your goals and context into a solution that makes sense for your business and works clearly for your visitors.

hireMePage.servicesIntroTitle: Digital products built to work clearly
hireMePage.servicesIntroDescription: I design and build digital products that need to be clear, reliable, and purposeful. From websites and landing pages to web and desktop applications: no unnecessary layers, just professional work that solves real problems.

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: I build complete websites that fit your business, offer, and audience. You get a site with a clear structure, strong mobile support, and a solid base to launch with confidence.

applications.title: Web and desktop applications
applications.description: I build applications that simplify processes, present information clearly, and feel solid in day-to-day use. That can be an internal tool, a client portal, or a desktop application that fits the way your business actually works.

landingPages.title: Landing pages
landingPages.description: I create landing pages with one clear goal: inform, persuade, or improve conversion. The structure and content are shaped around what your visitor needs to take the next step.

seo.title: SEO basics
seo.description: I make sure the technical and content foundation for search visibility is in place. For example with a logical page structure, strong titles, clean metadata, and a website search engines can read properly.

process.title: How I work
process.description: I work in a practical way, communicate clearly, and keep the process easy to follow from the first conversation to launch. That means you always know the next step, where we stand, and what I need from you.
process.interactionHint: Hover a step or click it to see more context.

step1.title: Introduction
step1.description: We talk about what you need, who the website is for, and what it needs to achieve. I ask focused questions so we can quickly identify where the real value is.

step2.title: Strategy / structure
step2.description: Next, I map out the main structure: content, flow, and logical page or section setup. That gives us a clear foundation before we spend time on details.

step3.title: Design
step3.description: I turn the structure into a design that fits your identity and works well for your visitors. Every design choice stays functional, so the look supports the goal.

step4.title: Build and feedback
step4.description: Then I build the website and work step by step toward a strong first version. You can give feedback along the way, so we can adjust without making the process messy.

step5.title: Launch and aftercare
step5.description: Once everything is right, I launch the website and check that the essentials are in place. I also remain available afterward for small improvements, questions, or practical follow-up.

pricing.title: Clear costs, aligned upfront
pricing.intro: No standard rate, but clear expectations from the start.
pricing.description: No website project is exactly the same. The cost depends on the scope, the content, the functionality required, and the timeline. That is why I define upfront what is needed, which choices make sense, and what the budget should realistically cover.
pricing.note: That way, you know where you stand before we start, without surprises afterward.

contact.title: Tell me what you need built
contact.description: Need a website, landing page, or improvements to an existing site? Send a short message. Your email app opens with the details prefilled so you can quickly share your project or inquiry.
contact.directEmail: Prefer to send a direct inquiry?

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.message: Briefly describe your project, timeline, or question.

mailto.fallbackBody: I need help with a website or landing page and would like to discuss the project.
mailto.subject: Project inquiry via portfolio

hero.title: Hi and welcome. Let's build something amazing together!

about.title: Who am I?
about.description: I'm Martijn, a software architect with a passion for building scalable and efficient systems. I have experience in various programming languages and frameworks, and I enjoy exploring new technologies. Feel free to check out my <blog>blog</blog> for insights on software development, architecture, and more!

project.title: AI-Assisted Portfolio Evolution
project.summary: Improving this portfolio with practical UX upgrades, stronger project storytelling, and better conversion paths from visitor to contact.

insights.title: Insights
insights.placeholderExcerpt: Fresh articles are on the way. Check back soon for new insights.

toolkit.title: Toolkit
toolkit.description: I have 15 years of programming experience across backend, cloud, and product development. Lately, I have been focusing more on AI-driven product development and agentic workflows. I enjoy solving complex problems, and I keep learning every day to stay sharp with new tools, patterns, and technologies.
